1057.issue: [E1057] js-controller 5.0.19 listed as dependency but 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please update dependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/io-package.json).

1074.issue: [W1074] Potential sensitive data "pass" not listed at "encryptedNative" in [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/io-package.json)

1078.issue: [W1078] "common.materialize" is deprecated for admin >= 5 at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/io-package.json). Please use property "common.adminUI.config".

1090.issue: [E1090] admin dependency missing. admin 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please add to globalDependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/io-package.json).

1127.issue: [W1127] [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "smart.updates3" common.states must be number or string

2004.issue: [E2004] Versions "5.0.10, 5.0.9" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/io-package.json) do not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.iot). Please remove from news section.

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 6.0.3 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3001.issue: [S3001] "@iobroker/legacy-testing" is used. Consider migrating to "@iobroker/testing" for better support.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (src/lib/AlexaSmartHomeV3/DeviceManager.ts, src/lib/AlexaSmartHomeV3/Helpers/RateLimiter.ts). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "mime" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#1177] "[iobroker-bot] Remove deprecated common.materialize from [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/io-package.json)"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/issues/1177)

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json, /src-rules/package.json), but no npm dependabot entry matches affected directories. Add matching "directory" or "directories" entries.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "mime" (dependencies) can be updated from 3.0.0 to 4.1.0. The newer version has been published for 258 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/package.json).

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.7.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
